data.name: Dashboard_EmptyQuestionnairesList
data.value: មិនមានកម្រងសំនូរទេ​ អ្នកអាចបង្កើត ឬពិនិត្យកែ កម្រងសំនួររបស់អ្នក ក្នុង រៀបការបង្កើត Survey Solutions

data.name: Dashboard_EmptySearchResult
data.value: មិនអាចស្វែងរកកម្រងសំនួរ

data.name: Dashboard_ToolbarText
data.value: កម្រងសំនួរ

data.name: DateQuestion_Hint
data.value: វាយបញ្ចូលកាលបរិច្ចេទ

data.name: EndpointHint
data.value: ចំនុចចុងក្រោយសំរាប់គ្រប់គ្រងរូម

data.name: EndpointText
data.value: ចំនុចបញ្ចប់ សេវាweb

data.name: ErrorMessage_AccountIsLockedOnServer
data.value: គណនីអ្នកប្រើបានចាក់សោរ។ សូមទាក់ទងទៅក្រុមជំនួយ

data.name: ErrorMessage_AccountIsNotApprovedOnServer
data.value: គណនីរបស់អ្នកមិនដំណើរការ។ សូមបញ្ជាក់គណនីដំបូងរបស់អ្នក

data.name: ErrorMessage_InternalServerError
data.value: Server មិនដំណើរការ។ សូមទាក់ទងទៅក្រុមជំនួយ

data.name: ErrorMessage_InvalidEndpoint
data.value: Survey Solutions Designer URL មិនមានដំណើរការ។ សូមពិនិត្យទៅ ស៊ីតធីង

data.name: ErrorMessage_Maintenance
data.value: គេហទំព័រ របស់ Survey Solutions Designer ឥឡូវកំពុងរៀបចំ។ សូមអាធ្យាស្រ័យសំរាប់ការរអាក់រអួល

data.name: ErrorMessage_RequestTimeout
data.value: មិនអាចដំណើរការ ពេលភ្ជាប់ទៅ​គេហទំព័រ Survey Solutions Designer ។ សូមពិនិត្យការភ្ជាប់អ៊ិនធឺណែតរបស់អ្នក។

data.name: ErrorMessage_ServiceUnavailable
data.value: មិនអាចភ្ជាប់ទៅនឹងSurvey Solutions Designer។ សូមប្រាកដាថា ឈ្មោះគេហទំព័រត្រឹមត្រូវ

data.name: ErrorMessage_Unauthorized
data.value: ចុះឈ្មោះចូល ឬ លេខកូដរបស់អ្នកមិនត្រឹមត្រូវ

data.name: ErrorMessage_UpgradeRequired
data.value: កំណែថ្មីនៃឯកសារត្រូវបានជំនួស។ សូមធ្វើបច្ចប្បន្នភាពឯកសារ។​

data.name: FilteredComboboxQuestion_Hint
data.value: វាយបញ្ចូលកាលបរិច្ចេទ

data.name: GpsQuestion_Timeout
data.value: ជីភីអេស មិនអាចកំណត់ទីតាំងរបស់អ្នកបានទេ។ មានការរំខានខ្លះ សូមព្យាយាមដូចខាងក្រោម៖ ប្រាកដថា អ្នកនៅខាងក្រៅផ្ទះ។ បញ្ជាក់ថា ជី ភី អេស របស់អ្នកដំណើរការ ឬផ្លាស់ប្តូរGPS's timeout setting។​

data.name: IntegerQuestion_Hint
data.value: វាយបញ្ចូលលេខ

data.name: Interview_Comment_Interviewer_Caption
data.value: មតិយោបល់របស់អ្នក

data.name: Interview_Complete_Consequences_Instrunction
data.value: បន្ទាប់ពីអ្នកសម្ភាសន៍ចប់ វានឹងកំណត់ថា​បានបញ្ចប់ និង បន្តuploaded ទៅប្រធានក្រុម កំឡុងពេល អ្នករៀបចំគ្រប់គ្រងរូម(synchronization)

data.name: Interview_Complete_Note_For_Supervisor
data.value: កំណត់សំគាល់របស់ប្រធានក្រុម

data.value: ស្ថានភាពសំនួរ

data.value: អ្នកបំពេញការសម្ភាសន៍នេះ

data.name: Interview_CompleteScreen_ButtonText
data.value: បំពេញក្រុមមុខ

data.value: បំពេញផ្នែក {0}

data.value: បង្ហាញការណែនាំ

data.name: Interview_Question_Integer_NegativeRosterSizeAnswer

data.value: វាយលេខ មិនអាចដកឃ្លាពីលេខគត់

data.name: Interview_Question_Integer_RosterSizeAnswerMoreThanMaxValue

data.value: ការចុះឈ្មោះចូល​

data.name: LoginTitleText
data.value: កម្រងសំនួរ សាកល្បង Survey Solutios

data.name: PlayServicesLocationWatcher_Google_Play_Services_are_not_available
data.value: សេវា Google play មិនដំំណើរការ

data.name: PlayServicesLocationWatcher_Location_Client_not_started
data.value: ទីតាំងនៃអតិថិជនមិនចាប់ផ្តើម

data.name: PlayServicesLocationWatcher_You_cannot_start_MvxLocation_service_more_than_once
data.value: អ្នកមិនអាចចាប់ផ្តើម សេវាទីតាំងMvxច្រើនជាងមួយ

data.name: Prefs_GpsDesiredAccuracySubTitle
data.value: ចំងាយគិតជាម៉ែត្រដើម្បីកំណត់ភាពជាក់លាក់

data.name: Prefs_GpsDesiredAccuracyTitle
data.value: សំនួរ ជី ភី អេស ចង់បានភាពជាក់លាក់

data.name: RealQuestion_Hint
data.value: វាយបញ្ចូលទសភាគ

data.name: StaySignedInText
data.value: នៅរក្សាក្នុង ការចុះឈ្មោះ

data.name: Synchronization_UserLinkedToAnotherDevice_Description
data.value: អ្នកមិនអាចមានការស្នើសុំមួយណា សំរាប់ការបែងចែកនេះ។ ផ្ញើរពត៌មានអំពី ធេប សំរាប់សំអាតទិន្នន័យ និង ចុះឈ្មោះចូលដោយគណនីមួយទៀត

data.name: TextListQuestion_Hint
data.value: វាយបញ្ចុលសំភារៈថ្មី

data.name: TextQuestion_Hint
data.value: វាយជាអត្ថបទ

data.name: TextQuestion_MaskHint
data.value: វាយជាអត្ថបទ ({0})

data.name: Validity_Answered_Invalid_ErrorCaption
data.value: ចំលើយមិនត្រូវ

data.name: Validity_NotAnswered_InterviewException_ErrorCaption
data.value: ចំលើយមិនបានរក្សាទុក

data.name: Assignment_Status_Closed
data.value: បានយល់ព្រម

data.name: MapDashboard_AssignmentStatusTitle
data.value: ស្ថានភាពការចាត់តាំង

data.name: Interview_Questions_RemoveRowFromRosterMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove related roster '{0}' from each related roster?

data.name: Interview_Questions_RemoveRowFromRosterListMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove related rosters?

data.name: InvalidTimeMessage
data.value: It is important that the clock setting is accurate. Your clock indicates that current date is set incorrect. Adjust the clock by setting the correct date/time before continuing your work.

data.name: Interview_Complete_CriticalIssues_Instrunction
data.value: To activate the button, please resolve the critical issues

data.name: Interview_Complete_WithWarningCriticality
data.value: Please confirm you want to submit this interview with critical issues.

data.name: Interview_Complete_Note_For_Supervisor_with_Criticality
data.value: To activate the button, please resolve the critical issues or provide an explanation in the comment box above

data.name: Interview_Complete_CriticalityIssuesDescription
data.value: Please resolve the issues by answering critical questions and making sure the answers satisfy the critical rules

data.name: Interview_Complete_Screen_DescriptionWithInterviewKey
data.value: You are about to complete interview {0}

data.name: Interviewer_Reassign_Comment
data.value: Leave comment for a new responsible

data.name: Interviewer_Reassign_AlreadyReceivedInterview
data.value: Interviewer {0} has already received this interview {1}. Are you sure you want to reassign it?

data.name: Interviewer_Reassign_AlreadyReceivedAssignment
data.value: Interviewer {0} has already received this assignment {1}. Are you sure you want to reassign it?

data.name: Messages_WaitPendingOperation
data.value: Please wait until the current operation is completed

data.name: Prefs_VibrateOnErrorSummary
data.value: The tablet is going to vibrate when an answer didn't pass the validation

data.name: Prefs_VibrateOnErrorTitle
data.value: Vibrate when invalid answer is given

data.name: Prefs_CommunicationIntegrityValidationIgnoreSummary
data.value: When enabled, communication integrity validation errors will be ignored

data.name: Prefs_ShowLocationOnMapSummary
data.value: Load map to show location for GPS questions

data.name: Prefs_DownloadUpdatesForInterviewerAppSummary
data.value: If interviewers don't have an access to the internet, this functionality should be enabled, because it makes it possible to update their applications during offline synchronization with the Supervisor application

data.name: GpsQuestion_MissingPermissions
data.value: Application does not have enough permissions to execute requested action. Retry answering question and allow access. If you don't see permissions popup then go to Settings and allow application to use device location.

data.name: MissingPermissions_Camera
data.value: Application needs to have a permission to use camera in order to answer this question. Retry answering question and allow access. If you don't see permissions popup then go to Settings and allow application to use camera.

data.name: MissingPermissions_Microphone
data.value: Application needs to have a permission to use microphone in order to answer this question. Retry answering question and allow access. If you don't see permissions popup then go to Settings and allow application to use microphone.

data.name: MissingPermissions_Storage
data.value: Application needs to have a permission to use storage in order to answer this question. Retry answering question and allow access. If you don't see permissions popup then go to Settings and allow application to use storage.

data.name: MissingPermissions_MapsLocation
data.value: Application needs to have a permission to use location. If you don't see permissions popup then go to Settings and allow application to use location.

data.name: MissingPermissions_Microphone_Global
data.value: Application needs to have a permission to use microphone. Retry last action and allow access. If you don't see permissions popup then go to Settings and allow application to use microphone.

data.name: MissingPermissions_Storage_Global
data.value: Application needs to have a permission to use storage. Retry last action and allow access. If you don't see permissions popup then go to Settings and allow application to use storage.

data.name: MissingPermission
data.value: Application has not enough permissions to execute requested action

data.name: AreaMap_LocationOutOfBoundaries
data.value: Your location is outside the boundaries of the map.

data.name: AreaMap_LocationDataSourceFailed
data.value: Location cannot be captured. To troubleshoot, please try the following: ensure that you are outdoors, confirm that your GPS is enabled, or change your GPS's timeout setting

data.name: AreaMap_MapIsOutOfVisibleBoundaries
data.value: Loaded map is outside of visible boundaries

data.name: AreaMap_ErrorOnShapefileLoading
data.value: Error occured on loading. Shapefile cannot be handled

data.name: AreaMap_NoMapsFound
data.value: No maps were found. Please update maps

data.name: Version_Not_Supports
data.value: Your application version does not support this feature. Please install Interviewer with Maps to enable it.

data.name: Device_Does_Not_Support
data.value: Your device doesn't support this functionality

data.name: AreaMap_ItemsOutsideDedicatedArea
data.value: Some markers fall outside the outlined area

data.name: MapDashboard_Disclaimer
data.value: only items with known coordinates are shown

data.name: Audio_Io_Exception_Message
data.value: Could not save audio file. Please check whether the device has internal storage available.

data.name: Audio_Unhandled_Exception_Message
data.value: Unexpected exception during start audio recording

data.name: Interview_Questions_Integer_ProtectedValue
data.value: New answer to a protected question should be greater or equal to {0}

data.name: Interview_MaxAnswersCountSelected
data.value: The maximum number of selections ({0}) in this question has been made

data.name: OfflineSync_InstallPlayServices
data.value: Google Play Services must be installed.

data.name: Validity_QuestionDoesntExist
data.value: The current roster does not exist anymore. Please navigate to the next available section or roster using the navigation menu.

data.name: Validity_InterviewSizeLimitReached
data.value: This interview contains more data than the system allows. If possible, delete unnecessary roster rows and/or unanswer questions.

data.name: Interview_Question_NumberRosterRemoveConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove {0} row(s) from each related roster?

data.name: ErrorMessage_PermissionForUnkownSourcesRequired
data.value: There is no permission granted to application to self update. Please enable "Allow from this source" option in 'App info' settings menu.

data.name: Interview_Complete_SwitchTo_WebMode_Instruction
data.value: This interview will be accessible online after synchronization. To access the interview the respondent should enter the link below in the browser on an internet-connected computer, tablet, or smartphone. The same link can be scanned using the QR-code shown below.

data.name: Interview_Complete_Instruction
data.value: Once submitted, this interview will be locked and cannot be edited. Please make sure all information is correct.

data.name: AreaMap_Save_With_Warning_Confirm
data.value: You are about to save not a precise the result. Do you want to continue?

data.name: Geofencing_Warning_Message
data.value: You are outside of designated area

data.name: Interview_Complete_Success_Text
data.value: All required questions answered No errors detected
